contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Wayne UX.APP onboarding + DAO Partners rename migration + operator-partner machinery
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/28
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/29
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/168
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/128
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/129
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/300
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/302
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/303
  
  Details:
  End-to-end shipping of Wayne (UX.APP) onboarding as the DAO's first Operator Partner, plus the partners-sheet rename + consumer migration that fell out of the work.
  
  What shipped:
  
  1. dao_client `onboard_partner` extended with `operator` role (no venue / no address / no inventory / no website surfaces). First operator manifest + onboard for Wayne — Contributors A403 + DAO Partners R43.
  
  2. dao_client `check_in_partner` extended to accept operator-partner check-ins (no partner_id). Submitted first such check-in for Wayne — Method=Email, Next Check-in Date=2026-05-22 (Friday call signal).
  
  3. Phase 1 gid migration: switched every consumer of the literal `Agroverse Partners` tab name to look up by gid 1983902109 — dao_client, three market_research scripts, two Apps Script projects (shipping_planner_api, partner_poke_drafts).
  
  4. Tab renamed `Agroverse Partners` → `DAO Partners` via gspread; gid unchanged; all consumers verified resolving cleanly post-rename.
  
  5. Fixed `processPartnerCheckInsFromTelegramChatLogs` GAS scanner — was skipping check-ins without partner_id, blocking Wayne's check-in promotion. Now accepts either partner_id or contributor_name.
  
  6. Recovered the auto-checkin-on-send v0.1 extension to `partner_poke_drafts` from a safety branch + shipped it cleanly (the WIP had been bundled into an earlier PR and was extracted; this lands just the feature).
  
  7. Deployments: tdg_shipping_planner @19, partner_poke_drafts @46 and @47, find_nearby_stores @36.
  
  Operator-partner machinery now works end-to-end: register → list on DAO Partners → submit check-in → land on Partner Check-ins → surface in poke scheduler.
  
  PRs merged today:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/28
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/29
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/168
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/128
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/129
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/300
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/302
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/303
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 300.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
